
#DE analysis was run using .gct readcount files generated by the RNAseq pipeline
#and also the combined covariates file generated by the eQTL section

#run full dataset DE analysis
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired.R NaiveT,NaiveT_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveT_peer13.combined_covariates_header.txt NaiveB,NaiveB_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveB_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired.R GCB,GCB_readcount.gct.gz,GCB_peer11.combined_covariates_header.txt TFH,TFH_readcount.gct.gz,TFH_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired.R NaiveT,NaiveT_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveT_peer13.combined_covariates_header.txt  TFH,TFH_readcount.gct.gz,TFH_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired.R NaiveB,NaiveB_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveB_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt  GCB,GCB_readcount.gct.gz,GCB_peer11.combined_covariates_header.txt

#the above set of commands outputs results found in supplementary table 9

#run M/F split DE analysis
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_sex_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_sex.R NaiveT,NaiveT_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveT_peer13.combined_covariates_header.txt NaiveB,NaiveB_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveB_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_sex_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_sex.R GCB,GCB_readcount.gct.gz,GCB_peer11.combined_covariates_header.txt TFH,TFH_readcount.gct.gz,TFH_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_sex_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_sex.R NaiveT,NaiveT_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveT_peer13.combined_covariates_header.txt  TFH,TFH_readcount.gct.gz,TFH_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_sex_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_sex.R NaiveB,NaiveB_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveB_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt  GCB,GCB_readcount.gct.gz,GCB_peer11.combined_covariates_header.txt

#and now also age split DE analysis
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_age_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_age.R NaiveT,NaiveT_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveT_peer13.combined_covariates_header.txt NaiveB,NaiveB_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveB_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_age_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_age.R GCB,GCB_readcount.gct.gz,GCB_peer11.combined_covariates_header.txt TFH,TFH_readcount.gct.gz,TFH_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_age_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_age.R NaiveT,NaiveT_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveT_peer13.combined_covariates_header.txt  TFH,TFH_readcount.gct.gz,TFH_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt
bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_age_out.txt Rscript DESEQ2_paired_age.R NaiveB,NaiveB_readcount.gct.gz,NaiveB_peer12.combined_covariates_header.txt  GCB,GCB_readcount.gct.gz,GCB_peer11.combined_covariates_header.txt

#the above two sets of commands output results found in Zenodo under DE_subsets
#significant genes only are found in supplementary table 10

#add gene names and make volcano plots
for i in NaiveT_NaiveB GCB_TFH NaiveT_TFH NaiveB_GCB;
do for c in paired 4paired 5paired Mpaired Fpaired;
do bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_volcano_out.txt Rscript plot_DESEQ2_paired_volcano.R "$i" "$c";
done; done

#the full dataset (paired) volcano plots are supplementary figure 3

#UpSet plots
for c in paired 4paired 5paired Mpaired Fpaired;
do bsub -o DESEQ2_paired_upset_out.txt Rscript plot_DESEQ2_UpSet_paired.R "$c";
done

#the full dataset (paired) upset plot is shown in figure 2C
#subset upset plots are not shown

#Heterogenetiy testing and forest plots for subset analyses only:
DESEQ2_subset_paired_cochran_forest.R 

#these figures compose supplementary figure 5
